title: INTERACT
desc: I’m building an all-in-one hackathon platform where students discover events and organizers manage registrations - all inside one clean, simple system.

title: GetItDone
desc: An anonymous freelancing marketplace I’m building where clients hire skilled agents using secure escrow-based payments - designed to keep things private, fair, and transparent.

title: Studique
desc: A campus super-platform trusted by 15,000+ SRM students to access resources, track attendance, join discussions, and stay updated with everything happening on campus.

title: SRM GPA
desc: A simple academic web tool I built to help SRM students calculate SGPA, track CGPA, and predict grades in one place.

title: IRCTC Redesign
desc: A complete redesign concept of the IRCTC booking platform - focused on making ticket booking simpler, cleaner, and more accessible.

title: Morph
desc: A fintech-style interface concept where users upload images to generate clean, morph-based face designs with a modern, minimal feel.

title: SRMConnect
desc: A database system I built for SRM clubs to manage members, records, and internal operations smoothly.

title: Play Store Visuals
desc: Designed Play Store visual screens for BluePicks - focused on brand clarity, product trust, and higher app conversion.

title: Brand Visuals
desc: Built complete visual systems for student communities - including posters, Instagram creatives, t-shirts, PPTs, and campaign assets for GitHub Community SRM, Studique and other groups.
